name: water-reminder-assistant
description: 安静常驻的喝水桌面小助手

scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check main.cjs && node --check preload.cjs && node --check reminder.js && node --check widget.js && node --check edge.js
scripts.release:mac:build: npm run check && node scripts/release-preflight.cjs mac build && electron-builder --mac dmg --arm64
scripts.release:win:build: npm run check && node scripts/release-preflight.cjs win build && electron-builder --win nsis --x64
scripts.release:mac: npm run check && node scripts/release-preflight.cjs mac publish && electron-builder --mac dmg --arm64 --publish always
scripts.release:win: npm run check && node scripts/release-preflight.cjs win publish && electron-builder --win nsis --x64 --publish always
